query_normalized: assessing the validity of statistical significance in randomized controlled trials with missing data statistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly addresses the mechanism of "missing data" (specifically block-wise missingness) in the context of "two-sample hypothesis testing" (the statistical engine of RCTs), providing a method to ensure the validity of test statistics and control Type-I error rates under these conditions.
